features: Enhanced Hydration: Formulated with oatmeal extracts to deeply hydrate and replenish skin, improving moisture balance and leaving it feeling soft and smooth.
Suitable for All Skin Types: Gentle and effective, this daily moisturizing cream is ideal for all skin types, including sensitive skin.
Fragrance-Free Formula: Designed for those who prefer products without added fragrances, ensuring a gentle experience for sensitive skin.
Convenient Tube Packaging: Easy-to-use squeeze tube for controlled dispensing, making application hassle-free and mess-free.
Restores Natural Barrier: Enriched with nourishing ingredients to support and restore the skin’s natural protective barrier for healthier, more resilient skin.
description: Experience the nourishing benefits of Nuage Oatmeal Daily Moisturizing Cream, specially formulated for all skin types. This lightweight cream, enriched with oatmeal extracts, replenishes and hydrates your skin, leaving it feeling soft, smooth, and healthy. Perfect for everyday use, this 200ml tube provides convenient hydration whenever you need it
